description_long: This jewelry set features a bold, contemporary necklace and matching earrings displayed on a white bust stand. The necklace is composed of large, geometric beads in turquoise, black, and white, with intricate swirling and dotted patterns that evoke a modern, artistic flair. The beads are strung on a thin black cord, with the largest beads positioned at the center and smaller ones toward the ends. The matching earrings mirror the necklace's motif, each featuring a cylindrical bead with similar turquoise and white patterns, suspended from simple hooks. The overall design is striking and visually balanced, with a playful yet sophisticated color palette. The jewelry appears to be crafted from lightweight polymer or ceramic materials, making it suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A modern necklace and earring set with large turquoise, black, and white patterned beads on a black cord, displayed on a white bust. The design is bold, geometric, and artistically detailed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with its large, patterned beads and the matching earrings, all displayed prominently on the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth and three-dimensional arrangement of the beads, with the cord visible around the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the thin black cord, with no jewelry details visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the profile of the necklace and earrings, emphasizing the bead shapes and arrangement.
